title: croton iteophyllus
intro: Croton iteophyllus, also known as the velvet croton or croton, is a species of flowering plant in the spurge family (Euphorbiaceae) native to tropical regions of the Pacific Islands. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Croton iteophyllus include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and protecting against oxidative stress. The herbal preparations of Croton iteophyllus include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are typically made by steeping the leaves or roots in hot water or a solvent.
